_comment_googleVerificationToken: Paste the verification token from Google Search Console (search.google.com/search-console) here after registering https://ipachiu.me/ as a URL-prefix property. The base.njk template will then emit the <meta name="google-site-verification"> tag automatically on the next build.
_comment_bingVerificationToken: Optional. Leave empty if Bing verification is done via 'Import from Google Search Console' in Bing Webmaster Tools (the recommended path). Only fill in if the GSC-import flow fails and a direct Bing <meta name="msvalidate.01"> tag is needed as fallback.
